      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad es fchohs Wahrons wedischu uhs to Weertu / ro
dsirdeju/ tad apfehdohs es / un esmu isredsejs/ ka mans Wahaudaju/ un bju noskummis tur mahjotu.

luhdsu preefsch to Waigu ta Dee-
wa no Debbes."
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un eſsfazziju : Af KUNGS !
tu Debbes Deews/ tu leelajs un
bihajamajs Deews/ kastu Der-
tibu un Schehlastibu turri teem/
fas tewimihfo/ un tawnus Bauſ-
lus farga."
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid luhdsams tawas Au-

tva Preefschã Deenãs Naktis

luhdsu to Israëta Behrnu Greh-
kus/ ar ko tee prett tew grehkoj-
fchi/ ir es / ir manna Tehwa
Nams effam grehkojschi."
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mehs effam tawã Preek-

neds tohs Likkunns/ neds tahs
Teefas / fo tu tawam Kalpam

    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Peeminini jelle to Wahrdw/

es juhs starp teem Laudim."
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja tad juhs pee mannis

nus Bauflus/ un darriteet tohs/
jeſschu tad juhsu Atisdshtee Deb-
bes Gallã buhtu/ tomehr es tohs
no turrenes falnſſifchu / un at-"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee ja irr tawi Kalpi

zaur tawn leelu Spehku/ un z
tawn stipru Rohku."
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Af KUNGS! laid j

wa Kalpa Luhgschanu / un

tees/ un laid luhdsams fcho-
labbi isdohdahs tawain Kalp-
un dohd winnam Apschehlof-
nas fcha Wihra Preekscha.
tad btju ta Kehnina Dsehree

    {
      "n": 1,

      "text": "Ta II. Nodalla.
